invocations.name: Agonizing Blast
invocations.effect: Add CHA mod to eldritch blast damage

invocations.name: Armor of Shadows
invocations.effect: Cast mage armor on self at will

invocations.name: Beast Speech
invocations.effect: Cast speak with animals at will

invocations.name: Book of Ancient Secrets
invocations.effect: Record ritual spells from any class

invocations.name: Fiendish Vigor
invocations.effect: Cast false life on self at will

invocations.name: Otherworldly Leap
invocations.effect: Cast jump on self at will

invocations.name: Repelling Blast
invocations.effect: Push creature 10ft on eldritch blast hit

maneuvers.name: Commander's Strike
maneuvers.effect: Ally uses reaction to attack, add superiority die to damage

maneuvers.name: Disarming Attack
maneuvers.effect: Add superiority die to damage, target drops item on failed STR save

maneuvers.name: Distracting Strike
maneuvers.effect: Add superiority die to damage, next ally attack has advantage

maneuvers.name: Evasive Footwork
maneuvers.effect: Add superiority die to AC while moving

maneuvers.name: Feinting Attack
maneuvers.effect: Advantage on next attack, add superiority die to damage

maneuvers.name: Goading Attack
maneuvers.effect: Add superiority die to damage, target has disadvantage attacking others

maneuvers.name: Lunging Attack
maneuvers.effect: Increase reach by 5ft, add superiority die to damage

maneuvers.name: Maneuvering Attack
maneuvers.effect: Add superiority die to damage, ally moves half speed without opportunity attack

maneuvers.name: Menacing Attack
maneuvers.effect: Add superiority die to damage, target frightened on failed WIS save

maneuvers.name: Parry
maneuvers.effect: Reduce damage by superiority die + DEX mod

maneuvers.name: Precision Attack
maneuvers.effect: Add superiority die to attack roll

maneuvers.name: Pushing Attack
maneuvers.effect: Add superiority die to damage, push target 15ft on failed STR save

maneuvers.name: Rally
maneuvers.effect: Ally gains superiority die + CHA mod temporary HP

maneuvers.name: Riposte
maneuvers.effect: When missed by melee, attack as reaction, add superiority die to damage

maneuvers.name: Sweeping Attack
maneuvers.effect: On hit, deal superiority die damage to adjacent creature

maneuvers.name: Trip Attack
maneuvers.effect: Add superiority die to damage, knock prone on failed STR save

metamagic.name: Careful Spell
metamagic.effect: Chosen creatures auto-succeed on spell save

metamagic.name: Empowered Spell
metamagic.effect: Reroll up to CHA mod damage dice

metamagic.name: Heightened Spell
metamagic.effect: One target has disadvantage on first save

metamagic.name: Quickened Spell
metamagic.effect: Cast as bonus action instead of action

metamagic.name: Subtle Spell
metamagic.effect: Cast without verbal or somatic components

metamagic.name: Twinned Spell
metamagic.effect: Target second creature with single-target spell

fighting_styles.name: Archery
fighting_styles.effect: +2 bonus to attack rolls with ranged weapons

fighting_styles.name: Great Weapon Fighting
fighting_styles.effect: Reroll 1s and 2s on two-handed weapon damage

fighting_styles.name: Protection
fighting_styles.effect: Impose disadvantage on attack against adjacent ally (reaction, shield)

fighting_styles.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
fighting_styles.effect: Add ability modifier to off-hand attack damage
